body:
- Makes `ty_fluxes_broadband` immutable

Note that `fluxes.flux_up/dn` are no longer views of `flux_up/dn`. Instead, `flux_up/dn` is assigned to `fluxes.flux_up/dn` after the solver is called.
title: Make `ty_fluxes_broadband` immutable

body:
Breaks down `ty_gas_optics_rrtmgp` into

 - `Reference` struct
 - `AtmosVars`, which is used with `lower` and `upper`
 - `AuxVars`, which is used with `lower` and `upper`

This will help towards making `ty_gas_optics_rrtmgp` immutable
title: Decompose `ty_gas_optics_rrtmgp`

body:
- Passes `atmos::AtmosVars` instead of its properties to functions
 - Remove arrays sizes from some input arguments
title: Simplify interfaces
